final:
module LDO (
    input wire [7:0] Vref, // Reference Voltage
    input wire control,     // Control signal
    output reg [7:0] obf_Vout   // Output Voltage
);
    always @(*) begin
        if (control) 
            obf_Vout = Vref;     // Active mode
        else 
            obf_Vout = 8'b00000000; // Standby mode
    end
endmodule
